description.en: Practical tasks, goals, or problems the customer wants to get done.
description.zh: 客户想完成的实际任务、目标或问题。

description.en: How the customer wants to feel before, during, or after the job.
description.zh: 客户在任务前、中、后想获得或避免的情绪感受。

description.en: How the customer wants to be perceived by others.
description.zh: 客户希望被他人如何看待。

value-proposition-canvas.en: Use this validated job as the central Customer Job in VPC; design Pain Relievers + Gain Creators around it.
value-proposition-canvas.zh: 把这条验证过的工作放进 VPC 中心,绕着它设计痛点缓解和收益创造。

empathy-map.en: Anchor this job to a specific persona × moment to keep it concrete.
empathy-map.zh: 把这个工作锚到一个具体 persona × 时刻,让它具体起来。

ad-lib-value-proposition.en: Compress the validated job + outcome into the one-sentence value-prop slot for stakeholder alignment.
ad-lib-value-proposition.zh: 把验证过的工作 + 结果压缩进 Ad-Lib 一句话,用来对齐利益相关方。

customer-journey.en: Plot when in the journey this job becomes acute — that's where the offering should hit hardest.
customer-journey.zh: 标出这个工作在旅程的哪个阶段变得紧迫 —— 那就是产品该发力的地方。
